hero.title: TAINOS CYBER CON
hero.tagline: Cybersecurity in the age of AI, cloud, and persistent threats

about.title: ABOUT
about.subtitle: Where cybersecurity meets the public
about.description: Tainos Cyber Con is an international cybersecurity awareness conference offering training, talks, and workshops. Our mission: provide equitable access to security solutions across all communities.
about.location_detail: 3235 Ave de la Gare, Mascouche, Room 2C2B

benefits.title: Threat Clarity
benefits.desc: Understand current risks and anticipate tomorrow's threats.

benefits.title: Practitioner Sessions
benefits.desc: Real cases and deployable tools presented by security professionals.

benefits.title: Timely Topics
benefits.desc: Content carefully selected based on industry trends.

benefits.title: Networking
benefits.desc: Connect with 50+ Quebec cybersecurity professionals and decision-makers.

items.title: AI & Cybersecurity
items.desc: Artificial intelligence as an attack vector and defense tool.

items.title: Cloud & SaaS Security
items.desc: Protecting your assets in hybrid and multi-cloud environments.

items.title: Identity & Access Management
items.desc: Zero trust, MFA, and privilege governance.

speakers.cta_desc: Practitioners, researchers, and decision-makers — share your expertise with our community.
